---
title: "Pi"
description: "Minimal terminal coding harness on Bedrock via bedrockify."
---

<Note>
**Experimental pack.** Pi is a lightweight terminal coding harness. This pack runs it against Bedrock through bedrockify, so you get Pi's minimal UX with Claude/Nova as the model.
</Note>

## When to use

- Want the smallest possible coding loop in a terminal
- Want to script agent invocations without a heavy TUI
- Bedrock billing, pure CLI

## What the pack installs

- `bedrockify` dep on port 8090
- Pi binary / harness
- Shell profile with PATH + aliases

## Install — non-interactive

```bash
curl -sfL install.lowkey.run | bash -s -- -y \
  --pack pi \
  --profile builder
```

## Pack parameters

| Param | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `region` | `us-east-1` | AWS region for Bedrock |
| `model` | `us.anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6-v1` | Model ID passed to Pi via bedrockify |
| `bedrockify-port` | `8090` | Where bedrockify listens |

## Resource requirements

| | All profiles |
|---|---|
| Instance | `t4g.medium` |
| Root volume | 40 GB |
| Data volume | 0 GB |

## First-run

```bash
aws ssm start-session --target <instance-id>
pi --version
pi
```

## Tear-down

Delete the stack.
